# Data quality checks

```{r celltype-noise-diagnostics}
# Uses .malignant.orig (all interactions, before unknown-celltype removal)
# to quantify how much "other/unknown/equivocal" noise each dataset contains.
QC_OUTPUT_DIR <- "~/Thesis/CCC/outputs/scDiffCom/plots/v6/qualityCheck"
dir.create(QC_OUTPUT_DIR, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

malignant_orig_catalog <- .hnsc_malignant_orig_catalog()

# ── Count interactions per gene per dataset ───────────────────────────────────
noise_counts_gene <- purrr::imap_dfr(malignant_orig_catalog, function(gene_list, ds_full) {
  purrr::imap_dfr(gene_list, function(df, gene) {
    if (nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)
    n_other <- sum(is.unknown.celltype(df$EMITTER_CELLTYPE) |
                   is.unknown.celltype(df$RECEIVER_CELLTYPE))
    data.frame(Dataset = ds_full, Gene = gene,
               Clean = nrow(df) - n_other, Contains_Other = n_other,
               stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  })
})

# ── Aggregate to dataset level ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
noise_counts <- noise_counts_gene %>%
  group_by(Dataset) %>%
  summarise(Clean = sum(Clean), Contains_Other = sum(Contains_Other), .groups = "drop")

# ── Summary table ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
table_celltype_noise_stats <- noise_counts %>%
  left_join(noise_ds_meta, by = c("Dataset" = "ds_full")) %>%
  mutate(
    Total_Interactions       = Clean + Contains_Other,
    Other_Interactions_Count = Contains_Other,
    Clean_Interactions_Count = Clean,
    Percent_Noise            = round(100 * Contains_Other / Total_Interactions, 2)
  ) %>%
  select(Dataset, Cancer_Type, Total_Interactions,
         Other_Interactions_Count, Clean_Interactions_Count, Percent_Noise) %>%
  arrange(Cancer_Type, Dataset)

print(table_celltype_noise_stats)
View(table_celltype_noise_stats)

# ── Per-gene summary table ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
table_celltype_noise_gene_stats <- noise_counts_gene %>%
  left_join(noise_ds_meta, by = c("Dataset" = "ds_full")) %>%
  mutate(
    Total_Interactions       = Clean + Contains_Other,
    Other_Interactions_Count = Contains_Other,
    Clean_Interactions_Count = Clean,
    Percent_Noise            = round(100 * Contains_Other / Total_Interactions, 2)
  ) %>%
  select(Dataset, Cancer_Type, Gene, Total_Interactions,
         Other_Interactions_Count, Clean_Interactions_Count, Percent_Noise) %>%
  arrange(Cancer_Type, Dataset, Gene)

print(table_celltype_noise_gene_stats)
View(table_celltype_noise_gene_stats)

# ── Long format for plotting ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
noise_long <- noise_counts %>%
  left_join(noise_ds_meta, by = c("Dataset" = "ds_full")) %>%
  pivot_longer(c(Clean, Contains_Other),
               names_to = "Category", values_to = "Count") %>%
  mutate(
    Category = factor(
      dplyr::recode(Category, Contains_Other = "Contains Other"),
      levels = c("Clean", "Contains Other")
    ),
    ds_short = factor(ds_short, levels = noise_ds_meta$ds_short)
  )

# ── Plot aesthetics ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fill_palette <- c("Clean" = "#4DAF4A", "Contains Other" = "#E41A1C")
# X-axis label colours follow cancer type: Breast = red, Lung = blue, H&N = darkgreen
x_label_cols <- dplyr::case_when(
  noise_ds_meta$Cancer_Type == "Breast" ~ "#E41A1C",
  noise_ds_meta$Cancer_Type == "Lung"   ~ "#377EB8",
  noise_ds_meta$Cancer_Type == "H&N"    ~ "#33A02C",
  TRUE ~ "black"
)

# ── Plot 1: Absolute counts ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
p_noise_counts <- ggplot(noise_long,
                         aes(x = ds_short, y = Count, fill = Category)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", width = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_palette) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x     = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, colour = x_label_cols),
    legend.position = "right"
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Celltype Noise in Malignant Interaction Pool",
    subtitle = "X-axis labels: red = Breast, blue = Lung, green = H&N",
    x = NULL, y = "Number of Interactions", fill = "Category"
  )

print(p_noise_counts)
ggsave(file.path(QC_OUTPUT_DIR, "celltype_noise_counts.png"),
       plot = p_noise_counts, width = 9, height = 6, dpi = 300)
message("Saved celltype_noise_counts.png")

# ── Plot 2: Proportions ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
p_noise_props <- ggplot(noise_long,
                        aes(x = ds_short, y = Count, fill = Category)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill", width = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_palette) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x     = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, colour = x_label_cols),
    legend.position = "right"
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Proportion of Celltype Noise in Malignant Interaction Pool",
    subtitle = "X-axis labels: red = Breast, blue = Lung, green = H&N",
    x = NULL, y = "Proportion of Interactions", fill = "Category"
  )

print(p_noise_props)
ggsave(file.path(QC_OUTPUT_DIR, "celltype_noise_proportions.png"),
       plot = p_noise_props, width = 9, height = 6, dpi = 300)
message("Saved celltype_noise_proportions.png")

# ── Plot 3: Per-gene % noise heatmap (Gene × Dataset) ─────────────────────────
noise_gene_tile <- noise_counts_gene %>%
  left_join(noise_ds_meta, by = c("Dataset" = "ds_full")) %>%
  mutate(
    Percent_Noise = 100 * Contains_Other / (Clean + Contains_Other),
    ds_short      = factor(ds_short, levels = noise_ds_meta$ds_short)
  )

n_genes_tile <- length(unique(noise_gene_tile$Gene))

p_gene_heatmap <- ggplot(noise_gene_tile,
                         aes(x = ds_short, y = Gene, fill = Percent_Noise)) +
  geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#4DAF4A", mid = "#ffffbf", high = "#E41A1C",
    midpoint = 50, limits = c(0, 100), name = "% Noise"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, colour = x_label_cols),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = max(4, 180 / n_genes_tile))
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Celltype Noise per Gene per Dataset",
    subtitle = "Color = % interactions containing 'other/unknown/equivocal' cell type\nX-axis labels: red = Breast, blue = Lung, green = H&N",
    x = NULL, y = "Gene"
  )

print(p_gene_heatmap)
ggsave(file.path(QC_OUTPUT_DIR, "celltype_noise_gene_heatmap.png"),
       plot = p_gene_heatmap,
       width  = 9,
       height = max(6, n_genes_tile * 0.25),
       dpi    = 300)
message("Saved celltype_noise_gene_heatmap.png")
```

## Cell-type interaction distributions

```{r qc-celltype-distributions}
library(ggalluvial)

# ── 1. Data Preparation ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Flatten malignant_orig_catalog (list of datasets → list of genes → data frames)
# into one tidy data frame: Dataset | Gene | EMITTER | RECEIVER
qc_interactions <- purrr::imap_dfr(malignant_orig_catalog, function(gene_list, ds_full) {
  ds_short <- noise_ds_meta$ds_short[noise_ds_meta$ds_full == ds_full]
  purrr::imap_dfr(gene_list, function(df, gene) {
    if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)
    data.frame(
      Dataset  = ds_short,
      Gene     = gene,
      EMITTER  = df$EMITTER_CELLTYPE,
      RECEIVER = df$RECEIVER_CELLTYPE,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  })
})

# Dataset factor ordered as in noise_ds_meta
qc_interactions$Dataset <- factor(qc_interactions$Dataset,
                                  levels = noise_ds_meta$ds_short)

# Aggregate: count interactions per Dataset × EMITTER × RECEIVER
qc_counts <- qc_interactions %>%
  dplyr::count(Dataset, EMITTER, RECEIVER, name = "n_interactions")

# Consistent cell-type order (most active first) for both axes
ct_order <- qc_interactions %>%
  dplyr::count(EMITTER, name = "n") %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  pull(EMITTER) %>%
  unique()

qc_counts <- qc_counts %>%
  mutate(
    EMITTER  = factor(EMITTER,  levels = rev(ct_order)),  # y-axis: top = most active
    RECEIVER = factor(RECEIVER, levels = ct_order)
  )

message("QC data prepared: ", nrow(qc_counts),
        " Dataset × EMITTER × RECEIVER combinations")

# ── 2. Faceted Heatmap ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
p_qc_heatmap <- ggplot(qc_counts,
                       aes(x = RECEIVER, y = EMITTER, fill = n_interactions)) +
  geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#ccd9ff", high = "#08306b",
                      name = "# interactions",
                      labels = scales::comma) +
  facet_wrap(~ Dataset, ncol = 3) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 7),
    axis.text.y      = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#e8e8e8", colour = NA),
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.spacing    = unit(0.5, "lines")
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Cell-Type Interaction Counts per Dataset (unfiltered)",
    subtitle = "'Other/Unknown/Equivocal' cell types included — rows = Emitter, cols = Receiver",
    x = "Receiver Cell Type", y = "Emitter Cell Type"
  )

print(p_qc_heatmap)
ggsave(file.path(QC_OUTPUT_DIR, "qc_celltype_heatmap.png"),
       plot = p_qc_heatmap, width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300)
message("Saved qc_celltype_heatmap.png")

# ── 3. Sankey / Alluvial Diagram (filtered malignant, all pairs) ──────────────
malignant_catalog <- stats::setNames(
  lapply(HNSC_DATASETS, function(ds) get(paste0(ds, ".malignant"), inherits = TRUE)),
  HNSC_DATASETS
)

sankey_interactions <- purrr::imap_dfr(malignant_catalog, function(gene_list, ds_full) {
  ds_short <- noise_ds_meta$ds_short[noise_ds_meta$ds_full == ds_full]
  purrr::imap_dfr(gene_list, function(df, gene) {
    if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)
    data.frame(
      Dataset  = ds_short,
      Gene     = gene,
      EMITTER  = df$EMITTER_CELLTYPE,
      RECEIVER = df$RECEIVER_CELLTYPE,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  })
})
sankey_interactions$Dataset <- factor(sankey_interactions$Dataset,
                                      levels = noise_ds_meta$ds_short)

sankey_ct_order <- sankey_interactions %>%
  dplyr::count(EMITTER, name = "n") %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  pull(EMITTER) %>%
  unique()

SANKEY_SUBTITLE <- "Tumor-involved interactions only"
SANKEY_GENE_FILTER <- list(Kurten = "AXL")   # per-dataset gene subset (NULL = all genes)

prep_sankey_data <- function(interactions) {
  interactions %>%
    dplyr::count(EMITTER, RECEIVER, name = "n_interactions") %>%
    arrange(desc(n_interactions))
}

# sqrt(n) transform: compresses dominant bands while keeping smaller categories visible.
STRATUM_WIDTH <- 1/2
make_qc_sankey_plot <- function(alluvial_data, ct_order, title, subtitle = SANKEY_SUBTITLE) {
  alluvial_data <- alluvial_data %>%
    mutate(
      EMITTER  = factor(EMITTER,  levels = rev(ct_order)),
      RECEIVER = factor(RECEIVER, levels = ct_order)
    )
  ggplot(alluvial_data, aes(axis1 = EMITTER, axis2 = RECEIVER, y = sqrt(n_interactions))) +
    geom_alluvium(aes(fill = EMITTER), width = STRATUM_WIDTH / 4, alpha = 0.65,
                  curve_type = "sigmoid") +
    geom_stratum(width = STRATUM_WIDTH, fill = "grey92", colour = "grey55",
                 linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_text(
      stat     = "stratum",
      aes(label = after_stat(stratum)),
      size     = 3,
      fontface = "bold",
      color    = "black"
    ) +
    scale_x_discrete(limits = c("Emitter", "Receiver"), expand = c(0.18, 0.18)) +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    theme_void(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x     = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, margin = margin(b = 6)),
      plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle   = element_text(size = 10, colour = "grey40", hjust = 0.5),
      plot.margin     = margin(0.5, 1, 0.5, 1, unit = "cm"),
      legend.position = "none"
    ) +
    labs(title = title, subtitle = subtitle)
}

sankey_alluvial_data <- prep_sankey_data(sankey_interactions)
p_qc_sankey <- make_qc_sankey_plot(
  sankey_alluvial_data, sankey_ct_order,
  title = "Cell-Type Interaction Flow — All Emitter→Receiver Pairs (All Datasets)"
)

print(p_qc_sankey)
ggsave(file.path(QC_OUTPUT_DIR, "qc_celltype_sankey.png"),
       plot = p_qc_sankey, width = 16, height = 10, dpi = 300)
message("Saved qc_celltype_sankey.png")

purrr::walk(levels(sankey_interactions$Dataset), function(ds) {
  ds_interactions <- sankey_interactions %>% filter(Dataset == ds)
  gene_filter <- SANKEY_GENE_FILTER[[ds]]
  if (!is.null(gene_filter)) {
    ds_interactions <- ds_interactions %>% filter(Gene == gene_filter)
  }
  ds_ct_order <- ds_interactions %>%
    dplyr::count(EMITTER, name = "n") %>%
    arrange(desc(n)) %>%
    pull(EMITTER) %>%
    unique()
  ds_alluvial <- prep_sankey_data(ds_interactions)
  title_suffix <- if (!is.null(gene_filter)) {
    sprintf("%s, %s only", ds, gene_filter)
  } else {
    ds
  }
  p_ds <- make_qc_sankey_plot(
    ds_alluvial, ds_ct_order,
    title = sprintf("Cell-Type Interaction Flow — All Emitter→Receiver Pairs (%s)", title_suffix)
  )
  out_path <- file.path(QC_OUTPUT_DIR, paste0("qc_celltype_sankey_", ds, ".png"))
  ggsave(out_path, plot = p_ds, width = 16, height = 10, dpi = 300)
  message("Saved ", basename(out_path))
})

# ── 4. Top-10 Summary Table ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
qc_top10 <- qc_interactions %>%
  mutate(ER_CELLTYPES = paste0(EMITTER, "_", RECEIVER)) %>%
  count(ER_CELLTYPES, EMITTER, RECEIVER, name = "n_interactions") %>%
  arrange(desc(n_interactions)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)

message("\nTop 10 most frequent Emitter→Receiver pairs (across all datasets):")
print(qc_top10)
View(qc_top10)
```
